services.title: Social Media Advertising
services.hook: Pay to appear in the feeds of your target audience
services.heading: 26% of social media users say they tend to buy brands they see advertised.

paragraphs.paraOne: Nearly all social media platforms allow businesses to deliver targeted advertisements to users based on factors such as age, gender, location, interests, and engagement patterns. This way, your ads are only shown to people who fit within your target audience, maximizing the efficiency of your marketing budget.
paragraphs.paraTwo: At RWI Labs, our social media advertising campaigns combine entertainment with trends in popular culture to pique the interest of users and stop them from scrolling away your advertising budget. We also carefully select which platforms to host your campaign on considering your target audience. Get in touch with us today to learn more about how advertising with social media can help your business achieve success online.

services.title: Search Engine Optimization
services.hook: Reach your target audience when it matters most.
services.heading: Businesses on the first page of Google capture over 97% of search generated traffic.

paragraphs.paraOne: A successful SEO strategy puts your brand in front of people actively searching for information related to your products or services. By appearing at the top of Google's Search Engine Results Pages (or SERPs for short), your website receives a boost in both traffic and credibility.
paragraphs.paraTwo: Our team combines both on-page and technical SEO tactics to improve your sites ranking with Google, Bing, and other popular search engines that your customers use to navigate the internet. Contact us today to learn more about how SEO fits into your digital marketing strategy.

services.title: Search Engine Marketing
services.hook: Quickly appear on the front page of search results
services.heading: Purchase a spot on the front page of Google to increase web traffic over night.

paragraphs.paraOne: While Search Engine Optimization can take months to yield results, Search Engine Marketing produces an immediate growth in new site users. It is a powerful tactic for raising awareness about your brand, and benefits new and established websites alike.
paragraphs.paraTwo: Our SEM strategies make the most of what search advertising has to offer, leveraging rich ad formats, ad extensions, and a/b testing to drive qualified potential customers to your site. Get in touch with us today to learn more about how we use SEM to bring new visitors to your site and increase conversions.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.hook: Build a community around your brand
services.heading: Over 58% of the global population is using social media.

paragraphs.paraOne: Today's myriad of social media platforms provide endless opportunities for your brand to interact with new and existing customers. Participating in trending discussions, organizing give-aways, or pledging your company's support for a social cause are among the many ways businesses can use social media to define their brand identity and build rapport with their target audience.
paragraphs.paraTwo: Regardless of how your business uses social media, consistently posting quality content is a must in order to grow your following. By conducting in-depth market research and deciphering the data produced by social media analytics tools, our team is able to develop a content plan that attracts users most likely to engage with your brand.

services.title: Web Design

services.title: Custom Web Applications
services.heading: Build software to fit your unique business needs - not the other way around.

paragraphs.paraOne: Although platforms such as Shopify and WordPress offer ready to use themes, apps, and plugins, sometimes configuring them to work for your business is more trouble than it’s worth. Working directly with source code allows you to take complete control of the functionality and design of your website, allowing for complex business processes and a truly unique user interface (UI) and experience (UX).
paragraphs.paraTwo: Our team of experienced developers uses popular technologies such as Nodejs, React/Nextjs, GraphQL, and MongoDB to build powerful, scalable web applications that satisfy the particular technical requirements of your business. If you have an idea for something that’s never been done before, contact us today to determine if a custom web application is right for you.

services.title: Shopify Development
services.heading: Get your store up and running fast with one of the world's most popular ecommerce platforms.

paragraphs.paraOne: With out of the box features such as abandoned cart recovery, fraud analysis, and seamless  integration with payment gateways such as PayPal and Apple Pay, Shopify is the increasingly preferred choice among both established ecommerce businesses and startups alike. And with unlimited bandwidth, you can confidently scale your site traffic without worrying about overloading your servers.
paragraphs.paraTwo: As a Shopify Partner, we have extensive knowledge on all the products and features Shopify has to offer. From selecting the right plan and apps best suited for your business needs, to custom Shopify theme and app development, our team has the technical and strategic understanding necessary to set your online business up for success.

services.title: Wordpress Development
services.heading: 43.2% of all websites on the internet are powered by WordPress.

paragraphs.paraOne: With thousands of themes to choose from and nearly 60,000 free plugins that address everything from SEO to site security, hosting your website on the WordPress platform enables your business to leverage already built functionality to significantly reduce development time. And with an easy to use admin dashboard for you and your team to manage content, it's no wonder so many companies are choosing WordPress for their Content Management System (CMS).
paragraphs.paraTwo: By using existing themes and plugins, our team is able to quickly deliver beautiful websites at a fraction of the cost of a custom web application. However, thanks to the extensive WordPress plugin directory, we are also able to extensively customize the look and functionality of your WordPress site while staying within your budget.
